case_title: TROY SUSAN B. VS JOHNSON MICHAEL W.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY TROY SUSAN B. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON MICHAEL W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TROY SUSAN B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON MICHAEL W. $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,120.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON MICHAEL W.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $535.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON MICHAEL W.
CERT. RECEIPT TO MICHAEL JOHNSON (BROWNIE'S HARDWARE) RETURNED SIGNED.
